_description: Manually locked template schema based on Track 1 output. Edit sections here to add/remove proposal sections.

sections.label: Header
sections.note: Client name, project, date, bid number — filled from metadata, no LLM

sections.label: Scope of Work
sections.note: LLM writes narrative from Team 1 scope JSON

sections.label: Inclusions
sections.note: LLM extracts what IS included from scope model

sections.label: Exclusions
sections.note: LLM derives from Team 1 gaps + Team 2 conflicts

sections.label: Pricing Summary
sections.note: Pulled directly from Team 2 cost estimate — no LLM

sections.label: Alternate Pricing
sections.note: LLM writes alternate descriptions if alternates exist

sections.label: Terms and Conditions
sections.note: Static boilerplate from config — no LLM
